text: 你经常结交新朋友。
text_en: You regularly make new friends.

text: 复杂、新颖的想法比简单直接的想法更让你兴奋。
text_en: Complex and novel ideas excite you more than simple and straightforward ones.

text: 与事实论据相比，你通常更容易被情感上产生共鸣的内容说服。
text_en: You usually feel more persuaded by what resonates emotionally with you than by factual arguments.

text: 你的生活和工作空间整洁有序。
text_en: Your living and working spaces are clean and organized.

text: 即使压力很大，你通常也能保持冷静。
text_en: You usually stay calm, even under a lot of pressure.

text: 在陌生人面前推销自己或建立人脉的想法让你感到非常为难。
text_en: You find the idea of networking or promoting yourself to strangers very daunting.

text: 你能有效规划任务并分清主次，经常在截止日期前很久就完成。
text_en: You prioritize and plan tasks effectively, often completing them well before the deadline.

text: 人的故事和情感比数字或数据更能打动你。
text_en: People's stories and emotions speak louder to you than numbers or data.

text: 你喜欢使用日程表、清单等工具来规划。
text_en: You like to use organizing tools like schedules and lists.

text: 即使只是一个小错误，也会让你怀疑自己的整体能力和知识。
text_en: Even a small mistake can cause you to doubt your overall abilities and knowledge.

text: 你很乐意主动走向感兴趣的人并开始交谈。
text_en: You feel comfortable just walking up to someone you find interesting and striking up a conversation.

text: 你对讨论文艺作品的各种解读不太感兴趣。
text_en: You are not too interested in discussions about various interpretations of creative works.

text: 在决定行动方案时，你更看重事实而非他人的感受。
text_en: You prioritize facts over people's feelings when determining a course of action.

text: 你经常让一天顺其自然，没有任何计划。
text_en: You often allow the day to unfold without any schedule at all.

text: 你很少担心自己给遇见的人留下什么印象。
text_en: You rarely worry about whether you make a good impression on people you meet.

text: 你喜欢参加团队活动。
text_en: You enjoy participating in team-based activities.

text: 你喜欢尝试新的、未经检验的方法。
text_en: You enjoy experimenting with new and untested approaches.

text: 你更看重体贴敏感，而不是完全坦诚。
text_en: You prioritize being sensitive over being completely honest.

text: 你会主动寻找新的经历和知识领域去探索。
text_en: You actively seek out new experiences and knowledge areas to explore.

text: 你容易担心事情会往坏的方向发展。
text_en: You are prone to worrying that things will take a turn for the worst.

text: 比起团体活动，你更喜欢一个人完成的爱好或活动。
text_en: You enjoy solitary hobbies or activities more than group ones.

text: 你无法想象自己以写虚构故事为生。
text_en: You cannot imagine yourself writing fictional stories for a living.

text: 做决定时你更看重效率，即使可能忽略一些情感因素。
text_en: You favor efficiency in decisions, even if it means disregarding some emotional aspects.

text: 你倾向于先做完该做的事，再让自己放松。
text_en: You prefer to do your chores before allowing yourself to relax.

text: 在争执中，你更在意证明自己的观点，而不是照顾对方的感受。
text_en: In disagreements, you prioritize proving your point over preserving the feelings of others.

text: 在社交场合，你通常等别人先自我介绍。
text_en: You usually wait for others to introduce themselves first at social gatherings.

text: 你的情绪可能变化很快。
text_en: Your mood can change very quickly.

text: 你不容易被情感层面的论据说服。
text_en: You are not easily swayed by emotional arguments.

text: 你经常拖到最后一刻才做事。
text_en: You often end up doing things at the last possible minute.

text: 你喜欢就伦理困境进行辩论。
text_en: You enjoy debating ethical dilemmas.

text: 你通常更喜欢和别人待在一起，而不是独自一人。
text_en: You usually prefer to be around others rather than on your own.

text: 当讨论变得很理论化时，你会感到无聊或失去兴趣。
text_en: You become bored or lose interest when the discussion gets highly theoretical.

text: 当事实和感受冲突时，你通常会跟着感觉走。
text_en: When facts and feelings conflict, you usually find yourself following your heart.

text: 你觉得很难保持固定、一致的工作或学习节奏。
text_en: You find it challenging to maintain a consistent work or study schedule.

text: 你很少会事后怀疑自己已经做出的选择。
text_en: You rarely second-guess the choices that you have made.

text: 朋友会形容你活泼、外向。
text_en: Your friends would describe you as lively and outgoing.

text: 你容易被写作等各类创意表达形式吸引。
text_en: You are drawn to various forms of creative expression, such as writing.

text: 你做选择时通常依据客观事实，而不是情感印象。
text_en: You usually base your choices on objective facts rather than emotional impressions.

text: 你喜欢每天都有待办清单。
text_en: You like to have a to-do list for each day.

text: 你很少感到不安或缺乏安全感。
text_en: You rarely feel insecure.

text: 你会尽量避免打电话。
text_en: You avoid making phone calls.

text: 你喜欢探索不熟悉的想法和观点。
text_en: You enjoy exploring unfamiliar ideas and viewpoints.

text: 你能和刚认识的人很快建立联系。
text_en: You can easily connect with people you have just met.

text: 如果计划被打断，你的首要任务是尽快回到正轨。
text_en: If your plans are interrupted, your top priority is to get back on track as soon as possible.

text: 很久以前犯下的错误至今仍会困扰你。
text_en: You are still bothered by mistakes that you made a long time ago.

text: 你对讨论“未来世界会怎样”之类的理论不太感兴趣。
text_en: You are not too interested in discussing theories about what the world could look like in the future.

text: 你的情绪支配你的程度，大于你掌控情绪的程度。
text_en: Your emotions control you more than you control them.

text: 做决定时，你更关注受影响的人会怎么想，而不是什么最符合逻辑或最高效。
text_en: When making decisions, you focus more on how the affected people might feel than on what is most logical or efficient.

text: 你的工作方式更接近即兴发挥，而不是有条理、有节奏地推进。
text_en: Your personal work style is closer to spontaneous bursts of energy than organized and consistent efforts.

text: 当别人对你有很高评价时，你会想他们多久后会对你失望。
text_en: When someone thinks highly of you, you wonder how long it will take them to feel disappointed in you.

text: 你会喜欢一份需要你大部分时间独自完成的工作。
text_en: You would love a job that requires you to work alone most of the time.

text: 你认为花时间思考抽象的哲学问题是在浪费时间。
text_en: You believe that pondering abstract philosophical questions is a waste of time.

text: 比起安静、私密的地方，你更被热闹、熙攘的氛围吸引。
text_en: You feel more drawn to busy, bustling atmospheres than to quiet, intimate places.

text: 如果某个决定让你感觉对，你常常会直接去做，而不需要更多证据。
text_en: If a decision feels right to you, you often act on it without needing further proof.

text: 你经常感到不堪重负。
text_en: You often feel overwhelmed.

text: 你会按部就班地完成事情，不会跳过任何步骤。
text_en: You complete things methodically without skipping over any steps.

text: 你更喜欢需要你想出创意方案的任务，而不是按具体步骤执行的任务。
text_en: You prefer tasks that require you to come up with creative solutions rather than follow concrete steps.

text: 做选择时，你更可能依赖情感直觉而不是逻辑推理。
text_en: You are more likely to rely on emotional intuition than logical reasoning when making a choice.

text: 你很难在截止日期前完成。
text_en: You struggle with deadlines.

text: 你相信事情会朝好的方向发展。
text_en: You feel confident that things will work out for you.
